blocks.content: It happened on a Thursday. Not a big thing. Not a decision, exactly.
Eli had pulled Kit to the lunch line early, and by the time they got to the table Brooke was already there with two other girls from 7C. Daisy came in late and ended up at the far end with Savannah.
Nobody planned it. It was just logistics.
Kit knew where Daisy was sitting because he'd looked.
Brooke said something funny. He laughed, then looked down the table. Daisy was not looking at him.
At the far end of the table, Savannah leaned close to Daisy.
Savannah looked down the table at Kit, then back at Daisy, and didn't say anything else.
